titanic_recipe <- recipe(Survived ~ Sex + Age + Pclass + Fare + Title + Embarked, 
                         data = titanic_train) %>%
  step_novel(Title, new_level = "o") %>% 
  step_other(Title, threshold = 0.005) %>% 
  step_dummy(all_nominal(), -Survived) %>% 
  step_knnimpute(all_predictors(), neighbors = 3) %>% 
  prep(training = titanic_train, verbose = TRUE)
